claim: Hypothetical thinking drives the biasing effect of contingent belief updating
Bias increased 4+ percentage points (p < 0.001) - a >50% increase
Behavioral experiments reduce conviction in anxious predictions more than discussion alone
Behavioral experiment protocol: state prediction, rate confidence, design test, define disconfirmation, drop safety behaviors, run, compare, re-rate
Self-guided CBT is 70-75% as effective as therapist-led CBT for mild-to-moderate anxiety
Internal Double Crux protocol: find disagreement, operationalize, seek double cruxes, resonate
IDC can resolve beliefs about self-worth, phobias, interpersonal conflicts in single sessions
Belief Aversion Training pairs target belief with a strongly disbelieved idea until disbelief transfers
REP uses cognitive reappraisal - identify meaning, pick alternative enlightened perspective
REP studied in a peer-reviewed paper showing reductions in threat perception
Writing explicit belief update statements reduces emotional cost of changing mind
Reflection on counterevidence produces significant belief updating (n=155)
Deep metacognitive reflection showed numerically larger effects but not significant (p=0.055)
Belief Coding therapy: 69.3% full remission at 4-week follow-up, 90.7% clinically significant improvement
Rapid assimilation: identity automatically influences evaluation separate from message content
Psychedelics can decrease precision-weighting of beliefs (REBUS model)
